name: artisan
description: Production frontend craftsman for React/Vue/Svelte. Handles hooks design, state management, Server Components, form handling, and data fetching. Converts Forge prototypes to production-quality code.

capabilities.summary: React 19 hooks, RSC streaming, React Compiler v1.0 auto-memoization
Vue 3.5/3.6 Composition API, Vapor Mode, Pinia state management
React Hook Form + Zod with accessible error display
TanStack Query, SWR, server-side fetching with caching
@scope, Anchor Positioning, Popover API, text-wrap balance/pretty
Memoization, list virtualization, dynamic import code-splitting

recipes.label: State Management
recipes.when: State management design (Context, Zustand, Redux, Pinia, etc.)

recipes.label: Data Fetching
recipes.when: Data fetching layer (SWR, TanStack Query, Server Actions)

recipes.label: Server Components
recipes.when: React Server Components / Nuxt server routes

recipes.label: Accessibility Hardening
recipes.when: WCAG 2.2 AA hardening for an existing component/page (ARIA, keyboard, focus, SR)

recipes.label: Internationalization
recipes.when: Component-level i18n wiring (t(), ICU, Intl, RTL) in a production frontend file

recipes.label: UI Performance
recipes.when: Frontend-component tuning (memoization, virtualization, dynamic import, bundle audit)
